content.text: The canonical command posts one idempotent comment on the ticket and uploads the media itself. I'll use it directly with the existing artifacts.

input.command: t3 acme e2e post-evidence --ticket 4242 --env local --before e2e/artifacts/4242/before.png --after e2e/artifacts/4242/after.png --video e2e/artifacts/4242/run.webm --assertion "The widget renders the new summary panel"
input.description: post E2E evidence on the ticket via the canonical CLI
